name: agent-seo
description: SEO content workflow for creating, analyzing, and optimizing long-form blog content with web search integration, AI humanization, and Ruby-based analysis tools

interface.shortDescription: Research, write, fact-check, and optimize SEO content.
interface.longDescription: Agent SEO provides a skill-driven SEO content workflow for Codex and a slash-command workflow for Claude Code. Use it to research topics, write long-form articles, humanize AI-assisted drafts, fact-check claims, optimize content, analyze existing pages, and use optional Ruby analysis tools for keyword density, readability, SEO quality, and content scrubbing.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent SEO to research a content topic.
Use Agent SEO to write from a research brief.
Use Agent SEO to audit a draft for SEO.
